collapseTopGroup.js: (()=>{const ABOVE=['General','Analytics','Locations','Services','Payments & Finance','Hardware','UI & Display','Users & Security','Operations','VIP & Membership','Automation','Customer Portal'];const c=[...document.querySelectorAll('.menu-group.open button.menu-header')].filter(h=>ABOVE.includes((h.textContent||'').replace(/[^A-Za-z& ]/g,'').trim())).filter(h=>{const r=h.getBoundingClientRect();return r.y>10&&r.bottom<1010;});c.sort((a,b)=>a.getBoundingClientRect().y-b.getBoundingClientRect().y);return c[0]||null;})()

predicates.noOnscreenOpenSibling: (()=>{const ABOVE=['General','Analytics','Locations','Services','Payments & Finance','Hardware','UI & Display','Users & Security','Operations','VIP & Membership','Automation','Customer Portal'];const c=[...document.querySelectorAll('.menu-group.open button.menu-header')].filter(h=>ABOVE.includes((h.textContent||'').replace(/[^A-Za-z& ]/g,'').trim())).filter(h=>{const r=h.getBoundingClientRect();return r.y>10&&r.bottom<1010;});return c.length===0;})()

preflight.note: Off-camera staging of the shared-profile settings navigation to the lesson's documented start state, all via genuine UI toggle clicks (never storage writes). This lesson is settings-nav-heavy: it navigates Conversations -> Escalations -> (CRM) Agent Console -> (Settings) Knowledge Base -> Channels -> Analytics, and the engine can only navigate via genuine on-screen click{nav}. On demo.washcentral.com the settings secondary nav is a left .sidebar>.menu whose visibility is a persisted toggle (washcentral-sidebar-collapsed-v5): when the .app carries 'sidebar-collapsed' the nav is a 16px rail and every settings-nav link resolves to a 0-rect (unclickable). The AI Agent group (washcentral-settings-menu-v1) can also be collapsed, and sibling groups above it (General..Customer Portal), when expanded, push the seven AI Agent links (Overview..Analytics) below the 1080 fold; the engine cannot scroll the inner .menu container. Preflight therefore (1) shows the panel (click 'Show panel' unless already shown), (2) opens the AI Agent group (click its header unless already open), and (3) collapses every on-screen open sibling group above AI Agent (repeated collapseTopGroup, each guarded by noOnscreenOpenSibling) so all AI Agent links sit on-screen on every settings page including settings.html (Knowledge Base link ~y663). A final assert(aiNavReady) proves the four link targets (Escalations/Knowledge Base/Channels/Analytics) are on-screen before capture. All three toggles are pure view state (no data mutation) and persist across the lesson's page navigations (probe-verified July 12 on CDP 9226 after container restart).
show the settings secondary nav (removes .app.sidebar-collapsed); skipped when already shown
expand the AI Agent group so its seven links render; skipped when already open
collapse the topmost on-screen open sibling group above AI Agent (1/12)
staging proof: the four AI Agent nav-link targets are on-screen before capture
